explanations.pt-br: Lista de exemplos CoT com pergunta e resposta passo a passo.
explanations.en-us: List of CoT examples with question and step-by-step answer.

explanations.pt-br: Inicia o prompt com instrução 'Resolva passo a passo'.
explanations.en-us: Starts the prompt with 'Solve step by step' instruction.

explanations.pt-br: Itera sobre os exemplos adicionando perguntas e respostas ao prompt.
explanations.en-us: Iterates over examples adding questions and answers to the prompt.

explanations.pt-br: Adiciona a pergunta final sem resposta para o modelo completar.
explanations.en-us: Adds the final question without answer for the model to complete.

explanations.pt-br: Imprime o prompt CoT few-shot completo.
explanations.en-us: Prints the complete CoT few-shot prompt.
